description: Keithley Model 2400 Series SourceMeter (Source Measure Unit): a combined precision voltage/current source and measurement instrument able to source and measure voltage, current and resistance, with programmable compliance (current/voltage limits), selectable measurement ranges, NPLC integration, digital filtering, 2- and 4-wire (remote) sensing, fixed/sweep/list/source-memory sourcing, a buffer (data store), limit/math (CALCulate) testing and digital I/O. The series covers the 2400, 2401, 2410, 2420, 2425, 2430 (with Pulse Mode) and 2440. Programmed using SCPI over GPIB (IEEE-488) or RS-232.

identity.description: IEEE-488.2 identification query. Returns 'KEITHLEY INSTRUMENTS INC., MODEL nnnn, xxxxxxx, yyyyy/zzzzz' where nnnn is the model number (e.g. 2400), xxxxxxx the serial number and yyyyy/zzzzz the firmware revision levels.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Identification query. Returns the manufacturer, model number, serial number and firmware revision levels of the unit.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Reset. Returns the SourceMeter to the *RST (GPIB) default conditions, cancels all pending commands and cancels any pending *OPC/*OPC? response.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clear status. Clears all event registers and the Error Queue.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Program the Standard Event Status Enable Register. Accepts decimal (NRf) or non-decimal (#H, #Q, #B) formats. *ESE 0 clears the register.

commands.name: event_status_read
commands.description: Read and clear the Standard Event Status Register.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Program the Service Request Enable Register. *SRE 0 clears the register. Accepts NDN (#H, #Q, #B) or NRf format.

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Read the Status Byte Register (does not clear it).

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Operation complete. Sets the OPC bit in the Standard Event Register after all pending command operations are complete. Typically sent after :INITiate.

commands.name: wait_to_continue
commands.description: Wait-to-continue. Suspends execution of subsequent commands until all previous overlapped commands are finished (effectively a no-op on the SourceMeter).

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Send a bus trigger to the SourceMeter (equivalent to a GPIB group execute trigger, GET). The unit reacts if BUS is the programmed arm control source.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Self-test query. Performs a checksum test on ROM and returns the coded result: 0 (pass) or 1 (fail).

commands.name: options_query
commands.description: Options query. Returns the presence or absence of installed options, e.g. '0' for none or 'CONTACT CHECK' if the contact-check option is present.

commands.name: save_setup
commands.description: Save the present instrument setup configuration in one of five memory locations for later recall.

commands.name: recall_setup
commands.description: Recall a previously saved instrument setup configuration from memory.

commands.name: configure_function
commands.description: Configure the SourceMeter for measurements on the specified function. Defaults related controls to *RST values, sets the trigger model to immediate/single, disables math and buffer, enables autozero and turns the source output ON. Query returns the active function(s).

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Request the latest post-processed readings from the sample buffer without triggering a new measurement or changing setup. Returned elements depend on :FORMat:ELEMents. Automatically asserted by :READ? and :MEASure?.

commands.name: sense_data_latest
commands.description: Works like :FETCh? but returns only the single most recent reading.

commands.name: read
commands.description: Trigger and acquire readings. Executes an :INITiate followed by a :FETCh?. The number of readings depends on the configured arm/trigger counts. The output must be on (or auto output-off enabled) to perform a :READ?.

commands.name: measure
commands.description: One-shot measurement. Performs a :CONFigure:<function> followed by a :READ? to acquire a single reading. If no function is specified, measures on the presently selected function. The source turns on for the measurement.

commands.name: initiate
commands.description: Initiate one or more source-measure cycles by taking the instrument out of the idle state.

commands.name: abort
commands.description: Reset the trigger system and return the instrument to the idle state.

commands.name: output_state
commands.description: Turn the source output on or off. Default OFF. Beware of hazardous voltage on the output terminals when on.

commands.name: output_enable
commands.description: Enable or disable the rear-panel output-enable interlock. Default OFF.

commands.name: output_enable_tripped
commands.description: Query whether the output enable has tripped: 1 (not tripped) or 0 (tripped).

commands.name: output_off_mode
commands.description: Select the output-off mode (the state of the output terminals when off). Default NORMal (GUARd on the Model 2410).

commands.name: route_terminals
commands.description: Select the front or rear input/output terminals. Default FRONt.

commands.name: source_function_mode
commands.description: Select the source function/mode. Default VOLTage. MEMory selects source-memory sweep operation.

commands.name: source_function_shape
commands.description: Model 2430 only: select the output mode, DC or PULSe. Default DC.

commands.name: source_delay
commands.description: Specify the source settling (delay) time in seconds. Default 0.

commands.name: source_delay_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable the auto source settling-time delay. Default ON.

commands.name: source_clear_immediate
commands.description: Turn the selected source off immediately.

commands.name: source_clear_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable auto output-off (auto clear) for the source, so the output turns on at the start of each source-delay-measure cycle and off after each measurement. Default OFF.

commands.name: source_clear_auto_mode
commands.description: Specify the auto-clear mode: ALWays (clear after every measurement) or TCOunt (after the trigger count is reached). Default ALWays.

commands.name: source_current_mode
commands.description: Select the current-source mode. Default FIXed.

commands.name: source_current_range
commands.description: Select the fixed current-source range. Accepts a value (range selected to cover it), or UP/DOWN.

commands.name: source_current_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable current-source autoranging. Default ON.

commands.name: source_current_level
commands.description: Set the immediate current-source output level in amps. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_level_triggered
commands.description: Set the current-source level applied when triggered. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_start
commands.description: Specify the start level for a current sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_stop
commands.description: Specify the stop level for a current sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_step
commands.description: Specify the step value for a current sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_center
commands.description: Specify the center point for a current sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_current_span
commands.description: Specify the span for a current sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_mode
commands.description: Select the voltage-source mode. Default FIXed.

commands.name: source_voltage_range
commands.description: Select the fixed voltage-source range. Accepts a value, or UP/DOWN. Default 21.

commands.name: source_voltage_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable voltage-source autoranging. Default ON.

commands.name: source_voltage_level
commands.description: Set the immediate voltage-source output level in volts. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_level_triggered
commands.description: Set the voltage-source level applied when triggered. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_protection
commands.description: Specify the V-source over-voltage protection limit. :SYSTem:PRESet default 40, *RST default NONE.

commands.name: source_voltage_protection_tripped
commands.description: Query whether the V-source protection limit has been reached: 1 (yes) or 0 (no).

commands.name: source_voltage_start
commands.description: Specify the start level for a voltage sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_stop
commands.description: Specify the stop level for a voltage sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_step
commands.description: Specify the step value for a voltage sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_center
commands.description: Specify the center point for a voltage sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_voltage_span
commands.description: Specify the span for a voltage sweep. Default 0.

commands.name: source_soak
commands.description: Set the soak (settling) time at the first sweep point. Default 0.

commands.name: source_sweep_spacing
commands.description: Select the sweep spacing (point distribution). Default LINear.

commands.name: source_sweep_points
commands.description: Specify the number of points in a sweep. Default 2500.

commands.name: source_sweep_direction
commands.description: Set the sweep direction: UP (start to stop) or DOWN (stop to start). Default UP.

commands.name: source_sweep_ranging
commands.description: Select the source ranging mode used during a sweep. Default BEST.

commands.name: source_sweep_cabort
commands.description: Set the abort-on-compliance behaviour for a sweep. Default NEVer.

commands.name: source_list_current
commands.description: Create a list of current-source values for LIST source mode (comma-separated). Query returns the list.

commands.name: source_list_current_append
commands.description: Append current-source values to the end of the existing current list.

commands.name: source_list_current_points
commands.description: Query the number of current-source values in the list.

commands.name: source_list_voltage
commands.description: Create a list of voltage-source values for LIST source mode (comma-separated). Query returns the list.

commands.name: source_list_voltage_append
commands.description: Append voltage-source values to the end of the existing voltage list.

commands.name: source_list_voltage_points
commands.description: Query the number of voltage-source values in the list.

commands.name: source_memory_save
commands.description: Save the present source-measure settings at a source-memory location.

commands.name: source_memory_recall
commands.description: Recall source-measure settings from a source-memory location.

commands.name: source_memory_points
commands.description: Specify the number of points in a source-memory sweep.

commands.name: source_memory_start
commands.description: Specify the start location for a source-memory sweep. Default 1.

commands.name: source_pulse_width
commands.description: Model 2430 only: set the pulse width for Pulse Mode.

commands.name: source_pulse_delay
commands.description: Model 2430 only: set the pulse delay for Pulse Mode.

commands.name: source2_ttl_level
commands.description: Specify the digital I/O output pattern on the rear-panel Digital I/O port. Bit range set by :SOURce2:BSIZe; format set by :FORMat:SOURce2.

commands.name: source2_bsize
commands.description: Set the Digital I/O bit size. Default 4 (16 with the 2499-DIGIO 16-bit option).

commands.name: sense_function_on
commands.description: Specify (enable) one or more measurement functions. Functions are quoted strings.

commands.name: sense_function_off
commands.description: Specify (disable) one or more measurement functions.

commands.name: sense_function_all
commands.description: Enable all measurement functions (when concurrent enabled) or enable the ohms function (when concurrent disabled).

commands.name: sense_function_concurrent
commands.description: Enable or disable the ability to measure more than one function simultaneously. When disabled, the volts function is enabled. Default ON.

commands.name: sense_function_state
commands.description: Query the state of a specified measurement function: 1 (on) or 0 (off).

commands.name: sense_current_range
commands.description: Select the current measurement range by specifying the expected current reading, or UP/DOWN. Default 1.05e-4.

commands.name: sense_current_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable current measurement autoranging. Default ON.

commands.name: sense_current_nplc
commands.description: Specify the current measurement integration rate in number of power line cycles (NPLC). Default 1.0.

commands.name: sense_current_protection
commands.description: Set the current compliance (limit) for the voltage source. Default 1.05e-4.

commands.name: sense_current_protection_tripped
commands.description: Query whether the source is in current compliance: 1 (yes) or 0 (no).

commands.name: sense_voltage_range
commands.description: Select the voltage measurement range by specifying the expected voltage reading, or UP/DOWN. Default 21.

commands.name: sense_voltage_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable voltage measurement autoranging. Default ON.

commands.name: sense_voltage_nplc
commands.description: Specify the voltage measurement integration rate in number of power line cycles (NPLC). Default 1.0.

commands.name: sense_voltage_protection
commands.description: Set the voltage compliance (limit) for the current source. Default 21.

commands.name: sense_voltage_protection_tripped
commands.description: Query whether the source is in voltage compliance: 1 (yes) or 0 (no).

commands.name: sense_resistance_mode
commands.description: Select the ohms (resistance) measurement mode. Default AUTO.

commands.name: sense_resistance_range
commands.description: Select the resistance measurement range by specifying the expected reading, or UP/DOWN. Default 2.1e5.

commands.name: sense_resistance_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable resistance measurement autoranging. Default ON.

commands.name: sense_resistance_ocompensated
commands.description: Enable or disable offset-compensated ohms. Default OFF.

commands.name: sense_resistance_nplc
commands.description: Specify the resistance measurement integration rate in number of power line cycles (NPLC). Default 1.0.

commands.name: sense_average_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the digital averaging filter. Default OFF.

commands.name: sense_average_tcontrol
commands.description: Specify the digital filter type. Default REPeat.

commands.name: sense_average_count
commands.description: Specify the digital filter count. Default 10.

commands.name: format_data
commands.description: Specify the data format for readings sent over the bus. Default ASCii.

commands.name: format_elements
commands.description: Specify which data elements are returned by FETCh?/READ?/MEASure?. Default all elements.

commands.name: format_elements_calculate
commands.description: Specify which CALC data elements are returned. Default CALC.

commands.name: format_border
commands.description: Specify the byte order for binary data. *RST default NORMal; :SYSTem:PRESet default SWAPped.

commands.name: format_sregister
commands.description: Select the data format used when reading status event registers. Default ASCii.

commands.name: format_source2
commands.description: Specify the data format used for SOURce2 (digital I/O) values. Default ASCii.

commands.name: calc1_format
commands.description: Select the CALC1 math format (math expression applied to readings).

commands.name: calc1_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the CALC1 math calculation.

commands.name: calc1_data
commands.description: Read the CALC1 math result.

commands.name: calc2_limit_state
commands.description: Enable or disable a CALC2 limit test (LIMit1 through LIMit12). Default OFF.

commands.name: calc2_limit_fail
commands.description: Return the result of a CALC2 limit test (LIMit1 through LIMit12): 0 (pass) or 1 (fail).

commands.name: calc2_limit_upper
commands.description: Specify the upper limit value for a CALC2 limit test (LIMit2, LIMit3, LIMit5..12). Default 1.

commands.name: calc2_limit_lower
commands.description: Specify the lower limit value for a CALC2 limit test (LIMit2, LIMit3, LIMit5..12). Default -1.

commands.name: calc2_limit1_compliance_fail
commands.description: Specify the LIMit1 compliance-test fail condition: IN or OUT of compliance. Default IN.

commands.name: calc2_clear_immediate
commands.description: Clear the latest limit test result and reset the Digital I/O port to the :SOURce2:TTL settings.

commands.name: calc2_clear_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic clearing of limit test results when :INITiate is sent. Default ON.

commands.name: calc2_climits_mode
commands.description: Set how composite-limit results control the Digital I/O lines. Default GRADing.

commands.name: calc2_climits_bcontrol
commands.description: Specify when binning info is sent to the handler: IMMediate (after each limit test) or END (after a sweep, list, or memory sequence). Default IMMediate.

commands.name: calc3_format
commands.description: Specify the CALC3 statistical math format computed over the buffer. Default MEAN.

commands.name: calc3_data
commands.description: Read the CALC3 statistical math result.

commands.name: trace_data_read
commands.description: Read the contents of the buffer (data store). :TRACe or :DATA may be used as the root command.

commands.name: trace_clear
commands.description: Clear all readings from the buffer.

commands.name: trace_free
commands.description: Query the number of bytes available and the number of bytes in use in the buffer.

commands.name: trace_points
commands.description: Specify the size of the buffer (number of readings to store).

commands.name: trace_points_actual
commands.description: Query the number of readings actually stored in the buffer.

commands.name: trace_feed
commands.description: Select the source of readings stored in the buffer.

commands.name: trace_feed_control
commands.description: Specify the buffer control mode: NEVer (storage off) or NEXT (fill buffer once then stop).

commands.name: trace_tstamp_format
commands.description: Select the buffer timestamp format: ABSolute or DELTa.

commands.name: trigger_count
commands.description: Specify the trigger count (number of measurements in the trigger layer). Default 1.

commands.name: trigger_delay
commands.description: Specify the trigger delay in seconds. Default 0.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Specify the trigger-layer control source. Default IMMediate.

commands.name: trigger_clear
commands.description: Clear any pending input triggers immediately.

commands.name: arm_count
commands.description: Specify the arm count (number of arm-layer cycles). Default 1. INFinite returns +9.9e37 when queried.

commands.name: arm_source
commands.description: Specify the arm-layer control source. Default IMMediate.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: IMMediate | TIMer | MANual | BUS | TLINk | NSTest | PSTest | BSTest

commands.name: arm_timer
commands.description: Set the arm-layer timer interval in seconds (used when arm source is TIMer). Default 0.1.

commands.name: system_preset
commands.description: Return the instrument to its :SYSTem:PRESet (bench) default conditions.

commands.name: system_posetup
commands.description: Select the power-on setup configuration.

parameters.name: setup
parameters.range: RST | PRESet | SAV0 | SAV1 | SAV2 | SAV3 | SAV4

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Query the SCPI revision level to which the instrument complies.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Return and clear the oldest error/status message (code and message) from the error queue.

commands.name: system_error_all
commands.description: Return and clear all errors (codes and messages) from the error queue.

commands.name: system_error_count
commands.description: Return the number of errors in the error queue.

commands.name: system_clear
commands.description: Clear all messages from the error queue.

commands.name: system_rsense
commands.description: Enable or disable remote (4-wire) sensing. Default OFF (2-wire). ON selects 4-wire sensing.

commands.name: system_azero
commands.description: Control auto zero. Default ON. ONCE forces an immediate auto-zero update.

commands.name: system_guard
commands.description: Select the guard type. Default CABLe.

commands.name: system_lfrequency
commands.description: Select the power line frequency in Hz.

commands.name: system_lfrequency_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic line-frequency detection.

commands.name: system_ccheck
commands.description: Enable or disable contact check (requires remote sensing enabled, :SYST:RSEN ON). Contact-check option only.

commands.name: system_ccheck_resistance
commands.description: Specify the resistance threshold for the contact check (default 50 ohm).

commands.name: system_beeper_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the beeper. Default ON.

commands.name: system_beeper_immediate
commands.description: Sound the beeper at a specified frequency for a specified time.

commands.name: system_key
commands.description: Simulate a front-panel key press. Query returns the last pressed key.

commands.name: system_rcmode
commands.description: Set the auto-range-on-compliance mode. Default SINGle.

commands.name: system_time
commands.description: Query the timestamp value.

commands.name: system_time_reset
commands.description: Reset the timestamp to zero seconds.

commands.name: system_memory_initialize
commands.description: Initialize the battery-backed RAM.

commands.name: system_local
commands.description: Take the unit out of remote (RS-232 only).

commands.name: system_rwlock
commands.description: Enable or disable local lockout (RS-232 only).

commands.name: status_preset
commands.description: Return all status registers to their default (preset) states.

commands.name: status_measurement_event
commands.description: Read the Measurement Event register.

commands.name: status_measurement_enable
commands.description: Program or read the Measurement Event Enable register.

commands.name: status_measurement_condition
commands.description: Read the Measurement Condition register.

commands.name: status_operation_event
commands.description: Read the Operation Event register.

commands.name: status_operation_enable
commands.description: Program or read the Operation Event Enable register.

commands.name: status_questionable_event
commands.description: Read the Questionable Event register.

commands.name: status_questionable_enable
commands.description: Program or read the Questionable Event Enable register.

commands.name: status_queue_next
commands.description: Read the most recent error/status message from the status queue.

commands.name: status_queue_clear
commands.description: Clear all messages from the status (error) queue.

commands.name: display_enable
commands.description: Turn the front-panel display on or off (turning it off can increase measurement speed).

commands.name: display_digits
commands.description: Specify the display resolution (number of digits). Default 6.

commands.name: display_text_data
commands.description: Define an ASCII text message for the top display (up to 20 characters). Use WINDow2 for the bottom display (up to 32 characters).

commands.name: display_text_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the user text-message display mode.

commands.name: display_cndisplay
commands.description: Return the display to the normal source-measure display state.
